Creative Jam 6/5/25 (43 min)

Part of the "Live Event Replays" module.

Creative Jam 6/5/25 (43 min)

Live Event Replays

👉

See “Squint Test” Deck here

.

Watch as Creative Strategist Ben Liebman digs into members’ ad accounts and provide creative feedback, with an emphasis on creative differentiation.

Timestamps:

[00:00] Improving on creatives with good leading indicators but no purchases/creating differentiated versions of a winning creative:

Titan Pickleball

[15:49] Improving creative for a footwear brand:

Brain Dead x Oakley Factory Team

[25:49] Where would carousels work with our one-SKU brand:

Ring Bear

[30:29] How do I improve on a winning UGC ad?

Tortuga Backpacks

[35:40] “The Squint Test” for differentiating creative (See deck above)

Mark As Complete

Great Job! Keep Going!
